expected_violation.rule: FAILED->READY is not in the PROTOCOL §7 transition whitelist; FAILED is terminal for the current instance and recovery MUST start at LOADING with a new session_id

note: All schema-level fields conform, but the from_state=FAILED to to_state=READY transition is illegal per PROTOCOL §7 transition table. FAILED is a terminal state; recovery MUST create a new session_id and start from LOADING. No hash or signature fields.

instance.reason: attempt to reuse failed adapter session
